issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Replace Babel + Jest with SWC in TS+React monorepo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses tsx parser, react automatic runtime, and @swc/jest while dropping .babelrc; baseline keeps Babel for Jest and omits tsx/JSX config.

scenarios.name: SWC production minify with console removal and source maps
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses SWC's native jsc.minify.compress.drop_console with passes:2 and sourceMaps:true; baseline incorrectly pulls in Babel/Terser plugins for console removal.
